---
title: "Georgia"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev = "ragg_png"
)

# load packages
library(shiny)
library(highcharter)
library(dplyr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)
library(reactable)
library(reactablefmtr)
library(htmltools)

# load data
source("prep/00_library.R")
source("prep/01_functions.R")
source("prep/dataframes.R")
```

<br>

::: narrow-section
```{r}

```
:::
